name: Nx Monorepo Build System API
what_it_does: Intelligent monorepo build system with computation caching and Nx Cloud API — orchestrating tasks across polyglot monorepos with affected-change detection, distributed task execution, and remote cache sharing for dramatically faster CI/CD.
use_cases: Querying affected projects and tasks via Nx CLI/API for targeted CI execution
Remote computation caching via Nx Cloud API to share build artifacts across machines
Distributed task execution across agent machines for parallel CI runs
Project graph queries to understand dependency relationships in monorepo
Integrating Nx task results and cache statistics into CI dashboards via Nx Cloud API
not_for: Single-project repositories without monorepo complexity (use plain npm/cargo/gradle)
Teams not using JavaScript/TypeScript as primary language (Nx is JS-first, though polyglot support exists)
Simple CI pipelines without build caching needs
best_when: A JavaScript/TypeScript team manages a large monorepo with multiple apps/libs and needs intelligent caching, affected detection, and distributed CI execution.
avoid_when: You have a single-project repo, no caching needs, or prefer Turborepo's simpler mental model.

auth.notes: Nx Cloud access token for remote cache and distributed execution. Organization-scoped tokens. Personal access tokens for CI integration. No fine-grained scopes — token grants full workspace access. Open-source CLI has no auth (local only).

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: Nx open source locally; Nx Cloud free for up to 500 CI pipeline runs/month
pricing.paid_tiers: Nx Cloud Pro from $500/month; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Nx open source is MIT licensed — free forever for local use. Nx Cloud (remote cache + DTE) has a free tier. Built by Nrwl. Strong Angular and React ecosystem adoption. Nx Cloud pricing based on CI hours/minutes saved. Self-hosted Nx Cloud available for Enterprise.

performance.rate_limits: API calls rate-limited per organization plan

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Nx Cloud REST API covers run details, task results, and cache statistics. CLI is primary interface — API is supplementary. Webhook support for run completion events. Good documentation. Project graph accessible via nx graph --file=output.json for agent consumption.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Task execution fully idempotent — same inputs produce same outputs (cache keys). Cache reads idempotent. Run creation creates new records per CI run.
known_agent_gotchas: CLI is primary interface — API is supplementary; many operations only via CLI
Computation cache keys depend on input hash — file changes bust cache
Distributed Task Execution (DTE) requires Nx Cloud — not available in open source
Affected detection requires full git history — shallow clones may miss affected projects

security_score_components.security_notes: MIT open source — auditable. SOC2 certified (Nx Cloud). GDPR compliant. TLS enforced. Access tokens per organization. Build artifacts in remote cache encrypted at rest. Self-hosted Nx Cloud for sensitive code. Nrwl enterprise support available.
